name: Impossible Ham Pie
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Ham, smoked fully cooked, cut
recipeInstructions:
1. GREASE a pie plate.
2. Sprinkle ham, cheese and onion in the pie plate.
3. BEAT the remaining ingredients together for 15 seconds in a blender on high speed.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie plate.
5. BAKE at 400°F (200°C) for 35-40 minutes, or until a knife inserted comes out clean.
6. COOL for 5 minutes before serving.
- Note: May substitute 12 slices bacon, crisply cooked and crumbled.
